---
title: "Supplemental Figure 1"
author: "Imke Bruns"
date: "2026-07-08"
output: html_document
---

# Set up script
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(ggplot2)
standard_plotTheme <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      size = 15,
      face = "bold",
      vjust = 2,
      hjust = 0.5
    ),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 13,
      face = "italic",
      vjust = 2,
      hjust = 0.5
    ),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, vjust = 0.25),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, vjust = 1),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )


theme_set(standard_plotTheme)

# define 6 custom colors
timepoint_cols <- c(
  "#1f77b4",  # blue 
  "#d95f02",  # orange
  "#7570b3",  # violet
  "#e7298a",  # magenta/pink
  "#66a61e",  # green
  "#e6ab02"   # mustard yellow
)

```



MANUSCRIPT SUPPLEMENTAL FIGURE 1

# Settings

## Set studyNR
```{r}
studyNR = "EUT046"
```


## Load packages
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(purrr)
library(here)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
```


## Load functions
```{r}
source(here("functions.R"), local = knitr::knit_global())
```



## Directories
```{r}
inputDir = file.path(here(), "input", studyNR)
outputDir = file.path(here(), "output", studyNR)

if(!dir.exists(outputDir)){
  dir.create(outputDir)
}

plotDir = file.path(here(), "figures", studyNR)

if(!dir.exists(plotDir)){
  dir.create(plotDir)
}
```



# Load data
```{r}
cytotox2 <- data.table::fread(file.path(inputDir, "tmp_cis_CD_rep4 1.txt")) %>% select(-V1)

LU_deg <- read_rds(file.path(inputDir, "Leiden", "deseq_output.rds"))
```


# Wrangle
```{r}
cytotox2_cis <- cytotox2 %>%
  filter(
    treatment == "Cis",
    cell_line == "RPTEC_TERT1_WT",
    variable != "imageCountParentObj"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    variable = recode(
      variable,
      "count_AnV_masked_primaryID_AreaShape_Area.DIV.Nuclei_AreaShape_Area_larger_0_" = "AnV",
      "count_PI_masked_primaryID_AreaShape_Area.DIV.Nuclei_AreaShape_Area_larger_0_" = "PI"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(time_h = timeAfterExposure)

```



# Plot

## PI & Annexin V positive

```{r}
study_timepoints <- c(4, 8, 16, 24, 48, 72)

plot_df <- cytotox2_cis %>%
  mutate(
    variable = recode(
      variable,
      AnV = "Annexin V positive",
      PI = "PI positive"
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(variable, time_h, dose_uM) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_value = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = sum(!is.na(value)),
    se_value = sd_value / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Convert fractions to percentages if needed
if (max(plot_df$mean_value, na.rm = TRUE) <= 1.5) {
  plot_df <- plot_df %>%
    mutate(
      mean_value = mean_value * 100,
      se_value = se_value * 100
    )
}

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(
    dose_label = factor(
      dose_uM,
      levels = sort(unique(dose_uM)),
      labels = paste0(sort(unique(dose_uM)), " µM")
    )
  )

p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = time_h, y = mean_value, color = dose_label, group = dose_label)) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = study_timepoints,
    linetype = "dashed",
    linewidth = 0.3,
    color = "grey70"
  ) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 75, 10),
    minor_breaks = seq(0, 75, 5),
    limits = c(0, 75)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Time after exposure (h)",
    y = "% positive cells",
    color = "Cisplatin concentration",
    title = "Cisplatin-induced Annexin V and PI positivity over time"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
  ) 

p

ggsave(file.path(plotDir, "supplementalFigureX_cytotox.pdf"), width=10, height=7)

```



## DEGs per treatment

```{r}

fc_cutoff <- log2(1.5)

deg_counts <- LU_deg %>%
  mutate(
    time_h = as.numeric(str_match(MEAN_ID_experiment, "_([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)hr(?:_|$)")[, 2]),
    dose_uM = as.numeric(str_match(MEAN_ID_experiment, "_([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)uM(?:_|$)")[, 2]),
    regulation = case_when(
      !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange >= fc_cutoff  ~ "Upregulated",
      !is.na(padj) & padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange <= -fc_cutoff ~ "Downregulated",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(time_h), !is.na(dose_uM), !is.na(regulation)) %>%
  group_by(time_h, dose_uM, regulation) %>%
  summarise(
    n_genes = n_distinct(gene_symbol_entrez_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  complete(
    time_h,
    dose_uM,
    regulation = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated"),
    fill = list(n_genes = 0)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    n_plot = if_else(regulation == "Downregulated", -n_genes, n_genes),
    dose_label = factor(
      dose_uM,
      levels = sort(unique(dose_uM)),
      labels = paste0(sort(unique(dose_uM)), " µM")
    ),
    time_label = factor(
      paste0(time_h, " h"),
      levels = paste0(sort(unique(time_h)), " h")
    )
  )


p_deg <- ggplot(deg_counts, aes(x = dose_label, y = n_plot, fill = regulation)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.3) +
  facet_wrap(~ time_label, ncol = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = function(x) abs(x)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Cisplatin concentration",
    y = "Number of differentially expressed genes",
    fill = NULL,
    title = "Number of Differentially Expressed Genes per Treatment"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "top"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("blue2", "firebrick2"),
                     breaks = c("Downregulated", "Upregulated"))

p_deg

ggsave(
  file.path(plotDir, "SupplementalFigureX_DEG_counts_by_concentration_timepoint.pdf"),
  p_deg,
  width = 10,
  height = 6
)
```


# Combine
```{r}
library(patchwork)

p /
  p_deg +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")

ggsave(file.path(plotDir, "SupplementalFigure1_cytotox_numberDEGS_combined.pdf"), width=10, height=13)
```
